title: centaurea incana subsp. ornata
intro: Centaurea incana subsp. ornata, also known as Mountain Bluet, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family, characterized by its grayish-green foliage and vibrant blue flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies. The health benefits of Centaurea incana subsp. ornata include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Centaurea incana subsp. ornata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for use in natural medicine.
